text.title: Graph RAG Indexing Pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline rerun produces a different graph; entity dedup fails; community detection unstable.
antipattern.root-cause: Author used uuid4() for chunk_id instead of content-derived hash.
antipattern.fix: Switch chunk_id to sha1(doc_id + chunk_index + content_hash)[:16].

antipattern.symptom: Graph has 50k 'organization' nodes for a 5k-doc corpus; communities are noise.
antipattern.root-cause: No entity canonicalization step — every casing variant becomes a node.
antipattern.fix: Insert canonicalization step: case fold + alias table + sim-dedup at 0.92 cosine.

antipattern.symptom: Per-query latency 30s+; LLM bill grows linearly with traffic.
antipattern.root-cause: Summaries treated as ephemeral, not cached by community version.
antipattern.fix: Cache summaries keyed by (community_id, member_set_hash); only invalidate on membership change.
